title: nepeta assadii
intro: Nepeta assadii, also known as Assadi's catmint, is a perennial herb species native to Iran. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, Nepeta assadii can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
